queries.question: What is the education and experience of the photojournalist?
queries.sql: SELECT education, experience FROM Journalist WHERE photojournalist = 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?education ?experience WHERE {
  ?journalist a :Journalists .
  ?journalist p:education ?education .
  ?journalist p:experience ?experience .
  ?journalist p:photojournalist ?photojournalist_f .
  FILTER((STR(?photojournalist_f) = "1" || STR(?photojournalist_f) = "1.0"))
}

queries.sparql:

  ?journalist p:photojournalist ?photojournalist_f .

queries.question: What is the background of the journalist named Alice?
queries.sql: SELECT education FROM Journalist WHERE name LIKE 'Alice%'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?education WHERE {
  ?journalist a :Journalists .
  ?journalist p:education ?education .
  ?journalist p:name ?name_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?name_lk), "^Alice.*$"))
}
